enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua.title: Enable Automatic Tagging for PDF/UA Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf to automatically tag a PDF for PDF/UA compliance and save the resulting tagged document.

create-pdf-heading-language-attribute.title: Create PDF with Heading and Language Attribute
create-pdf-heading-language-attribute.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading as a tagged structure element, and assign a language attribute to both the document and the heading.

set-root-structure-element-title.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
set-root-structure-element-title.description: Shows how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF and optionally update the document's metadata title using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tagged-pdf-with-logical-toc.title: Create Tagged PDF with Logical Table of Contents
create-tagged-pdf-with-logical-toc.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to build a logical structure tree, add a TOC element with entries, configure a page to render the TOC, and save the PDF as an accessible, tagged document.

add-paragraph-actualtext-under-toci.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI Element
add-paragraph-actualtext-under-toci.description: Demonstrates creating a TOCI element in a tagged PDF, appending a paragraph beneath it, setting the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility, and saving the modified document.

add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates creating a tagged PDF, adding a paragraph element, assigning a custom tag name, and saving the document.

add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.description: Loads an existing PDF, accesses its tagged content, creates a link element that points to an external URL, sets a title attribute for accessibility, and saves the updated document.

create-internal-page-link-tagged-pdf.title: Create Internal Page Link with /Link Role in Tagged PDF
create-internal-page-link-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical /Link element that points to an internal page number in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-note-to-paragraph.title: Add a Note (Footnote) to a Paragraph in a PDF
add-note-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a paragraph, attach a supplemental note as a footnote to that paragraph, and save the document.

add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Figure element, attach a Note element as its caption, and save the document as a tagged PDF to improve accessibility.

add-actualtext-to-images-in-tagged-pdf.title: Add ActualText to Images in a Tagged PDF
add-actualtext-to-images-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to assign ActualText (and AlternativeText) to image elements in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API, creating FigureElements and binding them to XImage resources.

set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.title: Set Hidden Pronunciation Text Using ActualText on a Span
set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.description: Demonstrates creating a tagged PDF span element, assigning visible text and hidden pronunciation via the ActualText property, and saving the updated document.

set-language-of-tagged-element-to-french.title: Set Language of a Tagged PDF Structure Element to French
set-language-of-tagged-element-to-french.description: Shows how to locate a specific tagged structure element in a PDF, change its language attribute to French, and save the updated document.

set-primary-language-for-tagged-pdf.title: Set Primary Language for Tagged PDF
set-primary-language-for-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf-element.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf-element.description: Shows how to set a language code on the root structure element of a tagged PDF and recursively apply it to every descendant element using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tagged-3x4-table-pdf.title: Create a Tagged 3x4 Table in PDF
create-tagged-3x4-table-pdf.description: Shows how to build a 3‑row by 4‑column accessible table and add it to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

create-table-header-merged-cells-actualt.title: Create Table Header with Merged Cells and ActualText
create-table-header-merged-cells-actualt.description: Demonstrates how to add a tagged table header to a PDF, merge header cells across columns, assign the TH role, and set the /ActualText attribute for accessibility.

create-styled-table-pdf.title: Create Styled Table in PDF
create-styled-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF with a three‑column table where each cell has custom background color, border thickness, and padding for better visual accessibility.

apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table Cells
apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to set different border thickness, color, and background for table rows based on their index while generating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

tag-table-cells-validate-pdfa2b.title: Tag Table Cells with Data Types and Validate PDF/A‑2B
tag-table-cells-validate-pdfa2b.description: Demonstrates how to build a logical table structure in a PDF, assign custom tags to cells based on their data type, and validate the resulting document for PDF/A‑2B compliance.

create-nested-table-in-paragraph.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph and Validate Tagging Hierarchy
create-nested-table-in-paragraph.description: Demonstrates adding a paragraph that contains a nested table to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API and recursively validates the logical structure hierarchy.

create-a-nested-list-with-bullet-and-num.title: Create A Nested List With Bullet And Numbered Items Assign Appropriate List Tags And Validate

create-form-field-with-structure-element.title: Create Form Field and Associate with /Form Structure Element
create-form-field-with-structure-element.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBox field to a PDF's AcroForm, create a corresponding /Form structure element for tagged PDF accessibility, and link the two before saving the document.

insert-form-field-with-placeholder.title: Insert Form Field with Placeholder and Tag as Form Element
insert-form-field-with-placeholder.description: Shows how to add a TextBox form field with placeholder text to an existing PDF and associate it with a tagged Form element for accessibility.

add-page-break-element-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
add-page-break-element-to-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break DIV element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds a paragraph by its displayed title, and modifies its ActualText attribute to improve accessibility.

replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.title: Update Note Element in Tagged PDF
replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, removes the first existing Note element from its tagged structure, creates a new Note element with updated text, and saves the modified document.

iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Details
iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.description: The example loads a PDF, verifies it contains tagged content, then recursively walks the logical structure tree, outputting each element's title, language, and custom tag.

set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to create a paragraph element in a tagged PDF, assign a concise title for accessibility, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF
set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to programmatically assign a concise Title to a Figure element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including setting document language and saving the result.

validate-pdf-ua-compliance.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
validate-pdf-ua-compliance.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, check its PDF/UA compliance, run Aspose.Pdf validation, and retrieve the detailed XML compliance report.

check-pdf-ua-compliance.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
check-pdf-ua-compliance.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, evaluate its PDF/UA accessibility compliance, and record the boolean outcome to the console and a log file.

parse-xml-validation-report-summary.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize PDF Errors
parse-xml-validation-report-summary.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract error codes and messages, and generate a summary of error occurrences and common violation messages.

find-images-missing-alt-text.title: Find Images Missing Alt Text in PDF
find-images-missing-alt-text.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's images, checks for alternative text, and writes the identifiers of images lacking Alt text to a text file.

extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree Traversal
extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its tagged content, recursively walking the logical structure tree, and collecting the actual text of each structure element.

export-pdf-structure-to-xml-xsl-report.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
export-pdf-structure-to-xml-xsl-report.description: Demonstrates exporting a PDF's logical structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then applying an XSLT stylesheet to create a human‑readable HTML report.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, traverse its logical structure tree, and serialize the hierarchy (type, alternative text, actual text, language) into a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

export-tagged-pdf-content-to-json.title: Export Tagged PDF Content to JSON
export-tagged-pdf-content-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, reads its tagged logical structure, builds a hierarchical model of StructureElements, and writes the hierarchy to a JSON file preserving the tag hierarchy.

extract-pdf-notes-to-text.title: Extract PDF Note Elements and Save to Text File
extract-pdf-notes-to-text.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, find all NoteElement objects, concatenate their ActualText values, and write the combined text to a plain .txt file.

extract-pdf-links-to-csv.title: Extract URLs from PDF Link Annotations to CSV
extract-pdf-links-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and link annotations, collects each link's URL, and writes the list to a CSV file.

batch-auto-tag-pdfs.title: Batch Auto‑Tag PDFs in a Folder
batch-auto-tag-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging for each document, and save the tagged PDFs with a custom suffix.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfs.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of untagged PDFs, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, set language and title, and save each document as a tagged PDF.

batch-validate-pdfs-summary-csv.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate Summary CSV
batch-validate-pdfs-summary-csv.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files for PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, write XML validation logs, and create a summary CSV of the results.

batch-pdfa1b-validation-with-xml-dashboa.title: Batch PDF/A-1b Validation with XML Logs and Dashboard
batch-pdfa1b-validation-with-xml-dashboa.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, validates each against the PDF/A‑1b standard using Aspose.Pdf, writes an XML validation log per file, and creates a summary dashboard showing compliance percentages in both console output and an XML file.

set-default-language-for-tagged-pdf-elem.title: Set Default Language for All Tagged PDF Structure Elements
set-default-language-for-tagged-pdf-elem.description: Demonstrates how to assign a language attribute to the document and to every structure element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
